'''Otunia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Bosph sector/Legends|Bosph sector]], and the home of the [[Kabul family]]. It was covered in deserts and had mineral-rich soil, perfect for [[Mining/Legends|mining]] by [[Kabul Industries]].

{{Planet-stub}}
